option.name: SCRIPT_TEXT
option.value: cd $PROJECT_DIR$/latex && LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 LANG=en_US.UTF-8 /Library/TeX/texbin/latexmk -pdf -interaction=nonstopmode quoridorDiplom.tex && LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 LANG=en_US.UTF-8 /Library/TeX/texbin/latexmk -pdf -interaction=nonstopmode presentation.tex && mkdir -p /private/tmp/quoridor-texmf-var && cd $PROJECT_DIR$/latex/article && LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 LANG=en_US.UTF-8 TEXMFVAR=/private/tmp/quoridor-texmf-var /Library/TeX/texbin/latexmk -lualatex -interaction=nonstopmode main.tex
